zh.lifeSummary: 當William Vaux於1375年出生在英國奧可福爾福林福德時，他的父親William Vaux II31歲，母親Joan Thirning41歲。他於1398年與Eleanor Drakelowe在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1403年住在英國諾薩普頓史爾。他去世於1405年在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Vaux于1375年出生在英国奧可福爾福林福德时，他的父亲William Vaux II31岁，母亲Joan Thirning41岁。他于1398年与Eleanor Drakelowe在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1403年住在英国諾薩普頓史爾。他去世于1405年在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈洛登享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Vaux was born in 1375, in Fringford, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Vaux II, was 31 and his mother, Joan Thirning, was 41. He married Eleanor Drakelowe in 1398, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He lived in Northamptonshire, England in 1403. He died in 1405, in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Vaux est né en 1375, à Fringford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Vaux II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Thirning, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Drakelowe en 1398, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Northamptonshire, Angleterre en 1403. Il est décédé en 1405, à Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Vaux 1375 in Fringford, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Vaux II 31 und seine Mutter Joan Thirning 41. Er hat 1398 in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Drakelowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1403 hat er in Northamptonshire, England gelebt. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Vaux è nato il nel 1375 nel Fringford, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Vaux II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan Thirning, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Drakelowe nel 1398, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Northamptonshire, England nel 1403. Morì nel 1405, nel Harrowden, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Vauxが1375年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアフリングフォードで生まれた時，父William Vaux IIは31歳，母Joan Thirningは41歳であった。1398年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアでEleanor Drakeloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1403年にはイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1405年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーロウデンで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Vaux(이)가 1375년 영국 스퍼드실르 프링퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Vaux II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Thirning(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 Eleanor Drakelowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1403년도에 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 살았다. 그는 1405년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해로우든에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Vaux nasceu em 1375, em Fringford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Vaux II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Thirning, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Drakelowe em 1398, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra em 1403. Ele faleceu em 1405, em Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Vaux родился в 1375 г. в местности фрингфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Vaux II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Thirning, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Drakelowe в 1398 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в 1403 году. Он умер в 1405 г. в местности харроуден, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Vaux nació en 1375, en Fringford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Vaux II, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Thirning, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Eleanor Drakelowe en 1398, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Vivió en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra en 1403. Murió en 1405, en Harrowden, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
